response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior Software Developer with 10+ years of experience applying for an entry-level/junior role. Strong technical match on TypeScript, React, REST, and PostgreSQL-adjacent skills, but severely overqualified — high flight risk, likely compensation mismatch, and a junior IC track would not utilize their architecture and leadership background. Also unclear fit for on-site requirement given Berlin base versus current remote-style roles.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple senior roles
Fullstack breadth from databases to UI, with AI/MCP and AWS exposure matching nice-to-haves
Proven craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, clean architecture interest
concerns: Severely overqualified — 10+ years and Staff/Senior titles for a junior IC role
High attrition risk and likely salary expectations far above junior band
Application to a junior position suggests possible mismatch in role expectations or motivation

key_factors.factor: Core stack alignment (TS, React, REST, SQL)
